channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This 10-second tweak will bring new life to any browser
item.description: When it comes to most home screens—on your phone, your computer, you name it—you’ve got endless-seeming options for customizing and taking control. The one canvas you can’t easily paint, curiously enough, is your browser’s New Tab page.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hoffman, Fast Company

item.title: Phone bans in class wanted, but not all-day restrictions: Poll
item.description: 68% of U.S. adults said in a Pew Research Center survey conducted Sept. 30-Oct. 6, 2024 say they approve of such rules.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: Judge delays order in antitrust case requiring Google to open up its app store
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — A federal judge on Friday delayed an order requiring Google to open up its Android app store to more competition until an appeals court decides whether to block the shake-up because of legal questions surrounding a jury's verdict that branded Google as an illegal monopolist.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: 6 key mobile and IoT/OT attack trend findings
item.description: The role of the CISO continues to expand, driven by the rising number of breaches and cyberattacks like ransomware, as well as SEC requirements for public organizations to disclose material breaches.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: California Uber and Lyft drivers could get back pay
item.description: The lawsuits accuse the companies of misclassifying workers; failing to pay minimum wage; and not paying for breaks, overtime and sick time.
item.dc:creator: Cal Matters, The Mercury News

item.title: US to probe Tesla's 'Full Self-Driving' system after pedestrian killed in low visibility conditions
item.description: The U.S. government’s road safety agency is investigating Tesla’s “Full Self-Driving” system after getting reports of crashes in low-visibility conditions, including one that killed a pedestrian.
item.dc:creator: Tom Krisher, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: El desarrollo de ‘software’ nativo de IA podría estar más cerca de lo que parece
item.description: Los desarrolladores no impresionados por los primeros resultados de la inteligencia artificial (IA) generativa para la codificación toman nota: el desarrollo de software se dirige hacia una nueva era, en la que la mayor parte del código será escrito por agentes de IA y revisado por desarrolladores e
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Meta partners with horror movie maker Blumhouse Productions to test Movie Gen
item.description: Facebook owner Meta said on Thursday it had teamed up with Blumhouse Productions, the Hollywood company behind popular horror films such as The Purge and Get Out, to put its new generative AI video model Movie Gen to the test.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: MrBeast’s YouTube dominance takes a dip
item.description: MrBeast’s YouTube growth has hit a rough patch. On Saturday, MrBeast uploaded a new video. “7 Days Exploring An Underground City” amassed 56.5 million views within four days. For any other YouTuber, those numbers would be seismic.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Dominion voting systems is still a GOP bogeyman ahead of the election
item.description: The election is nearly here, and Dominion Voting Systems is once again on Republicans’ minds. The voting machine-maker became the subject of conspiracy theories following the 2020 election, which Donald Trump falsely claims was rigged against him.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Scientists show how sperm and egg come together like a key in a lock
item.description: Scientists have pinpointed how sperm and egg fuse together across the animal kingdom, from fish to people.
item.dc:creator: Laura Ungar, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Airbnb launches co-host marketplace to boost listing supply
item.description: Investors are eager for details about new platform features that Airbnb has said will introduce new opportunities for revenue growth, which has slowed following an initial post-pandemic travel boom.
item.dc:creator: Tribune News Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Alabama man arrested in SEC social media account hack that led the price of bitcoin to spike
item.description: An Alabama man has been arrested for his alleged role in the January hack of a U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission social media account that led the price of bitcoin to spike, the Justice Department said.
item.dc:creator: Alanna Durkin Richer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How you can help protect your aging parents from scammers
item.description: "They were raised to be a very trusting generation, a very rule following generation, so they make the assumption that everyone has their best interest at heart," Paula Daigle said.
item.dc:creator: Hayley Wielgus, NewsNation

item.title: HPE, Dell launch another round of AI servers
item.description: The AI spin continues, with Hewlett Packard Enterprise and Dell Technologies both introducing new servers oriented towards training large language models (LLM).
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Hit the lights: Mets outfit Citi Field for electric light shows
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Mets are lighting up Citi Field, even before their batters step up to the plate. About 70 front-office staffers scattered around the ballpark for over five hours to install 3,500 strips of LED lights on each railing ahead of New York's first home postseason game.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Navy logistics modernization effort ready to take next step
item.description: Jeff Baur, the product director for logistics IT for the Navy’s PEO-MLB, said ensuring the new platform meets the users’ needs is a top priority. The post Navy logistics modernization effort ready to take next step first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Windows 10 Insider Previews: A guide to the builds
item.description: Microsoft never sleeps. In addition to its steady releases of major and minor updates to the current version of Windows 10, the company frequently rolls out public preview builds to members of its Windows Insider Program, allowing them to test out — and even help shape — upcoming features.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Feds seeks more guidance on post-quantum cryptography transition
item.description: Federal cyber experts say they need more formal guidance and a range of other tools for a post-quantum cryptography effort that's expected to cost billions. The post Feds seeks more guidance on post-quantum cryptography transition first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Trump thinks Google split would weaken US against China
item.description: The potential split up of Google that’s been proposed by the US Department of Justice (DOJ) could weaken the company, and thus the position of the US in its tech war with China, said former President Donald Trump, who suggested he may not break up the company if he wins the presidency again in Novem
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Meta taps Arista for Ethernet-based AI clusters
item.description: Arista Networks is partnering with Meta Platforms to deploy its Ethernet technology in AI clusters designed to handle large language models, high-bandwidth systems, and cloud communications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Good customer experience isn’t just good. For federal agencies, it’s the law
item.description: "The purpose of the act is to improve government websites and its related services to enhance that customer experience," said GAO's Carol Harris. The post Good customer experience isn’t just good. For federal agencies, it’s the law first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: SpaceX sues California regulators over rejected launches, claiming political bias
item.description: SpaceX filed a lawsuit against a California commission Tuesday, accusing members of political bias after they rejected the aerospace company’s request to allow more rocket launches from an air base in the state.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Countries that have cashed in on their top-level domain names
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Anguilla is raking in extra revenue from registration fees for its .ai web domain thanks to the artificial intelligence boom, but it's not the only place cashing in on demand for websites with distinctive address endings.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How to manage generative AI programs – governance, education, regulation
item.description: Generative artificial intelligence has grown extremely rapidly, attracting investment and sparking developer interest and creativity. Companies see generative AI as a route to building innovative services and revolutionizing their industries.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Tech consultant goes on trial in death of Cash App founder Bob Lee
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The tech consultant charged in Cash App founder Bob Lee's stabbing death had no motive to kill him and in fact was forced to defend himself against Lee, who had become aggressive while on a multiday drug bender, lawyers for Nima Momeni said in opening statements Monday.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Volunteers bring solar power to Hurricane Helene's disaster zone
item.description: BAKERSVILLE, N.C. (AP) — Nearly two weeks after Hurricane Helene downed power lines and washed out roads all over North Carolina's mountains, the constant din of a gas-powered generator is getting to be too much for Bobby Renfro.
item.dc:creator: GABRIELA AOUN ANGUEIRA, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: This 3D-printed Texas hotel is shaking up the construction industry
item.description: The Vulcan is Icon's massive 3D printer, which stands 15½ feet tall and weighs 4.75 tons. It's capable of creating buildings with 12-foot-high curving walls.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
